name: ASUS ROG MAXIMUS Z790 APEX ENCORE ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 2x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 4.0 x4 - Support DDR5-8400+(OC) - 5x M.2 Slots - USB 20Gbps Type-C - Intel 2.5GbE LAN - Intel Wi-Fi 7 - ROG DIMM.2 - ROG Memory Fan Kit
